case_title: NEWLAND, WILLIAM vs. FRANKUM, SCOTT et al

docket_entries.description: TRIAL ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 08

9:52AM: CASE CALLED FOR TRIAL WITHOUT JURY. NO APPEARANCE OF DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF SWORN AND EXAMINED. EXHIBIT 1- LEASE;EXHIBIT 2-30 DAY NOTICE; EXHIBIT 3-PROOF OF SERVICE OF 30 DAY NOTICE. ALL EXHIBITS MARKED, RECEIVED AND RETURNED. JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF FOR POSSESSION OF PREMISES PLUS $3596.59 PLUS COSTS AND ATTORNEY FEES PER COST BILL. PLAIANTIFF TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FRANKUM, SCOTT THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 601 MINNESOTA ST. #108,S.F. $3,596.59 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,596.59, LEASE FORFEITED
